name: Vantage Cloud Cost Management API
what_it_does: Multi-cloud cost management and FinOps platform with REST API — providing cost reports, anomaly detection, rightsizing recommendations, and budgets across AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, and Datadog, with API for embedding cost data in internal tools and automating cost workflows.
use_cases: Querying cloud cost data by service, team, or tag for internal cost dashboards
Creating cost reports and budgets programmatically for team cost allocation
Monitoring cost anomalies via webhook for real-time Slack/PagerDuty alerts
Exporting cost forecast data to BI tools via API for FinOps reporting
Automating savings opportunity tracking via rightsizing recommendations API
not_for: AWS-only cost management (AWS Cost Explorer has native tools)
Real-time cost streaming for billing (use cloud-native billing APIs)
Pure Kubernetes cost allocation without multi-cloud context
best_when: A FinOps or platform team needs multi-cloud cost visibility across AWS, Azure, GCP with API access for embedding cost data in internal tools and automated cost workflows.
avoid_when: You only use one cloud provider and native cost tools suffice, or need real-time cost streaming rather than aggregate reporting.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for third-party integrations. Bearer token for direct API access. Read and write scopes for cost reports, budgets, and recommendations. Workspace-scoped access. Webhook for cost anomaly and budget alerts.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: up to $10K/month cloud spend, basic cost reports
pricing.paid_tiers: Business from 1% of cloud spend/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Free tier for smaller cloud spends. Percentage-of-spend pricing (unusual for SaaS). US-based New York company. Multi-cloud: AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, Datadog, Snowflake, MongoDB. Good Terraform provider. Strong API for FinOps automation.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clean REST API for cost reports, saved filters, budgets, anomaly alerts, and recommendations. OAuth2 with scopes. Webhook for alerts. Good documentation. Terraform provider available. Cost data is aggregated (not real-time streaming). Report filters allow complex cost queries.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Cost report creation idempotent with same name. Budget creation idempotent by identifier. Cost data queries always idempotent. Anomaly acknowledgment idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Cloud cost data has 24-48 hour delay from cloud providers — not real-time
Percentage-of-spend pricing means costs grow with your cloud bill
Cost reports require understanding of Vantage's filter/group-by model
Multi-cloud integration requires separate connection setup per cloud

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. OAuth2 with scopes. US data residency. Read-only cloud account access via IAM roles (no write access to cloud accounts). Cloud credentials handled via cross-account IAM.
